analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience Birmingham in this spacious 4-guest entire home, offering 29.3% availability across the next 90 days (£234.64/night). Located in the city center, this non-Superhost property maintains a strong 4.8-star rating from 163 reviews. As one of the top 10% most expensive Birmingham listings (34% above market average), guests will enjoy exclusive use of the full home in a competitive market with 357 active listings. With 64 open nights across 90 days, this property balances premium pricing with consistent demand, outperforming the cohort's 28.3% occupancy benchmark. Host Sam offers 0 years of hosting experience but has maintained a 4.8 rating despite a non-rated average of None. While no specific amenities are currently listed, this home's central location makes it an attractive option for travelers seeking Birmingham accommodation at a premium price point.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a wide-angle shot of the living area as cover photo to showcase space and ambiance while reinforcing the 'Entire home' booking type
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate £234.64 is 34% above Birmingham median £175.00, but occupancy at 29.3% only slightly exceeds cohort median 28.3%
Zero listed amenities (score:2/10) despite market emphasis on Outdoor & Parking categories
Title lacks location keyword 'Birmingham' despite being core to guest search behavior
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £234/night rate is 34% above Birmingham's median price, yet occupancy slightly trails market average. A stronger title with location keyword could boost visibility.
